questions.subject: IOQM
questions.q: Let $A$ and $B$ be two finite sets such that there are exactly 144 sets which are subsets of $A$ or subsets of $B$. Find the number of elements in $A \cup B$.
questions.solution: $\begin{aligned} & 2^{a+b}+2^{b+c}-2^b=144=2^4 \cdot 9 \\ \Rightarrow & 2^b\left(2^a+2^c-1\right)=2^4 \cdot 9 \\ \Rightarrow & b=4 \& a=1, c=3 \\ & n(A \cup B)=5+7-4=8\end{aligned}$
